events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求返回一个JSON，但是场景是关于锯切缝延迟导致随机裂缝。工作阶段：rough-complete（安装完但未封闭）。参考标准：ACI 302, 308。任务：识别组件或条件，并命名可见的缺陷线索。

我们需要给出decision（pass/fail/needs_more_info），risk，work_stage，component_conditions等。根据场景，锯切缝延迟，导致随机裂缝，这是缺陷。工作还在rough-complete阶段，但缺陷已经存在。应该判fail。风险可能很高，因为裂缝影响耐久性。component_conditions应该是installed-defective（因为锯缝不及时导致缺陷）。percent_complete可以估计一下，比如90%但缺陷需要修复。value没有具体要求，可能是0。sound_source等无关。findings应该描述缺陷：锯切缝延迟，导致随机裂缝。actions：可能需要切割新缝或修复裂缝。rationale：延迟锯切缝，混凝土收缩导致随机开裂，不符合ACI 302/308要求。confidence高。references：ACI 302, 308。

所以JSON：
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Sawcut joints were performed too late, leading to random cracking caused by shrinkage."],
  "actions": ["Evaluate crack width and depth; if structural, repair by epoxy injection or routing and sealing; ensure proper jointing timing in future work."],
  "rationale": "Delayed sawcutting allowed shrinkage stresses to induce uncontrolled cracking, violating ACI 302/308 guidance on joint timing.",
  "references": ["ACI 302", "ACI 308"]
}

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Sawcut joints were performed too late, leading to random cracking caused by shrinkage."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Evaluate crack width and depth; if structural, repair by epoxy injection or routing and sealing",
    "Ensure proper timing for control joints in future pours per ACI 302/308"
  ],
  "rationale": "Delayed sawcutting allowed shrinkage stresses to induce uncontrolled cracking, violating ACI 302/308 guidance on joint timing.",
  "references": ["ACI 302", "ACI 308"]
}
